name: Buttermilk Pecan Waafles
recipeInstructions:
Combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl. Set aside.
In another bowl, beat the eggs until light. Add buttermilk and mix well.
Add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture and beat until the batter is smooth.
Stir in the melted margarine. Pour about 3/4 cup of batter onto a lightly greased,
preheated waffle iron. Sprinkle with a few pecans. Bake according to the manufacturer's
directions until golden brown. Repeat with remaining batter and pecans.
Source: A Taste of Home Magazine
